top_signals.title: BlackRock, Vanguard ETFs Diverge Over 170% AI-Fueled Rally
top_signals.summary: For more than a decade, investors could treat the two biggest emerging-market exchange-traded funds as almost interchangeable.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Fincantieri Strikes Four Deals in $687M Underwater Expansion
top_signals.summary: Italian shipbuilder Fincantieri has agreed to acquire majority stakes in four companies for an initial expenditure of about $687 million (€600 million), expanding its capabilities in marine drones, subsea services and underwater communications…
